candidates.why: Best balance-sheet tangible fixed-asset line; appears to be net PPE and preferable to cash-flow capex rows or lease-related gross/accumulated lines.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Tangible asset related to leases, but lease/right-of-use assets are not preferred for baseline PPE when a cleaner owned PPE line exists.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total/net balance.
Cash flow investing line, not balance-sheet PPE stock.
Cash flow disposal line, not PPE stock.
Intangible asset, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Computer Software - Intangible Assets - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-intangible asset, not PPE.
Intangible capex cash flow, not PPE stock.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist because it is the clearest balance-sheet PPE line and preferable to cash-flow lines or lease-related components.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.

candidates.why: Pre-working-capital operating cash flow, not the final net operating cash flow target.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line for the pre-working-capital subtotal, not the final operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist because this is the final net cash flow from operating activities, which best matches OANCF. | Auto-flag: best candidate confidence 0.25 < 0.65
